summary: Created the permissions adapter at src/permissions/permissions-adapter.ts. Exports PermissionState type ('granted' | 'denied' | 'prompt' | 'unsupported'), PermissionCheckResult interface, hasPermissionsAPI() for feature detection, queryPermission(name) for single permission queries with safe fallback to 'unsupported', and checkPermissions() that queries all standard permissions. All 124 tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
